item.title: 0.4.3 beta (build 25)
item.description:
Groovyday 0.4.3 private beta

  • The Dockscape drag grip is hidden until hover and stays reachable when the Dock auto-hides
  • Dockscape now opens at 2.5× Dock height, with a clearly expanded 2.25–3× range
  • Cover-derived palettes become brighter and more saturated with musical energy without introducing random hues
  • Every visualizer retains subtle ambient motion in silence, with clearer Particles and Skyline baselines

This is an opt-in development build for personal testing.
